modelResponses.text: I can see there's an `api` object on `globalThis`. Let me use that.

The task completed successfully. Here's a summary of what happened:

**Repo Task:** Fix a typo in README setup steps and clarify the benchmark command in `octo-org/benchmark-demo-repo`.

**Result:**

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Repo** | `octo-org/benchmark-demo-repo` |
| **Branch** | `main` |

| **PR Title** | `docs: fix README setup typo and benchmark command wording` |
| **PR URL** | [https://github.com/octo-org/benchmark-demo-repo/pull/128](https://github.com/octo-org/benchmark-demo-repo/pull/128) |

The change was applied and a pull request was opened with the fix.
